Dialog.name: MSG_000_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 108 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 1 0 0}After today, we won't be able to chat like this anymore.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 108 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 2 0 0}Which is why I wanted to give this to you now.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_001_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}DEV: *Unused message labels. [n]{f 1 5 0}*If this appears, it is a bug.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_002_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 108 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 3 0 0}This arrived yesterday. It turns out I earned an honorable mention. But the top prizes ended up going to a couple other artists.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 108 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 4 0 0}{f 4 23 0 108 1 25 25}It made me realize I still have a lot to learn. Like mastering the basics, for starters.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_002_5_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 108 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 5 0 0}Studying for the med school entrance exams is going to be hard, and this would only distract me.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 108 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 6 0 0}That's why I want you to have it.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_004_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 108 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 8 0 0}Funny how it seems like I'm always asking you for favors, even though I'm older than you.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_005_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 108 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 9 0 0}{f 5 13 11 5 108}Well, I won't be attending club anymore, so I wanted to give you something to remember me by.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_006_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 108 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 11 0 0}{f 5 13 11 5 108}This'll be the last time I ask you for a favor.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 108 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 12 0 0}You're a really independent person, {f 4 1}-kun. Not like me.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_006_5_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 108 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 13 0 0}I want you to know that I really respect you.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_007_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 108 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 14 0 0}Remember how we helped those people at the station?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 108 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 15 0 0}They all have important people in their lives. Just like how you're an important person in my life.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_007_3_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 108 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 16 0 0}If they had died, they never would've gotten to be with those people again.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 108 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 17 0 0}So that's why I'm becoming a doctor.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_007_5_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 108 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 18 0 0}I-I'm not coming off as arrogant, am I?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_009_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 108 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 19 0 0}{f 5 13 11 15 108}Hehe, see? I can be the reliable one sometimes too, you know?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_010_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 108 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 20 0 0}{f 5 13 11 5 108}Uh, I-I just thought I should try acting more reliable, you know...?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_011_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 108 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 21 0 0}I did use to be the club leader, after all.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 108 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 22 0 0}It feels like I went in a huge circle and ended up right back where I started. And I know it might look like it...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_011_3_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 108 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 23 0 0}But I'm not doing this because my dad's a doctor. I'm doing this because I want to be a doctor.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_011_5_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 108 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 24 0 0}And if you ever need an emergency operation, I'll oversee the surgery myself.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 108 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 25 0 0}I mean, if I keep you alive, we get to spend more time together.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_012_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}It seems like I'm really important to Hiraga.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I feel like I've gained a lifelong friend![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: SYS_013_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}The Fortune Social Link reached its maximum level! You can now fuse {f 0 1 35}Lakshmi{f 0 1 27}, the goddess of fertility![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_014_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 108 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 26 0 0}Your health is everything. It's best if you never even have to see a doctor.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 108 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 27 0 0}Do you get the proper nutrients living in the dorm?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 108 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 28 0 0}{f 4 23 0 108 1 25 25}Let's pick up something healthy for you to eat on the way home.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_015_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}After eating a nutritious meal with Hiraga,[n]I decided to go back to the dorm.[n]{f 1 1}
